body.title: CLOSED: Remove short timeouts from local inference paths
body.result: Removed sub-hour timeouts from 5 local-inference sites: IGOR_OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_SECS 90→7200, IGOR_OLLAMA_IMPULSE_TIMEOUT_SECS 15→3600, PREPARSE_TIMEOUT 8→3600, IGOR_LOCAL_PREPARSE_TIMEOUT_SEC 1.0→3600, config.py docstring 30→7200. Each site has inline pointer to theigors/rules/local-inference-no-timeouts. is_healthy (HTTP ping, not inference) explicitly exempt with comment. 5 new tests + 11 existing pass. Commit c112e23f.
body.description:
**Approved 2026-05-03 (Akien — repeated for the 5th+ time: 'no timeouts on local inference').** Palace rule theigors/rules/local-inference-no-timeouts is now the canonical home — this ticket implements it.

Remove every sub-hour timeout on local inference paths. Replace with 1-2 hour sanity cap (or no timeout where the underlying caller can be cancelled out-of-band). Audit ALL local inference call sites — Ollama in cognition gateway, ollama_reasoner internals, any preparse/winnow paths that call local LLMs.

Every touched site SHALL include an inline comment: `# rule: theigors/rules/local-inference-no-timeouts — local takes whatever time it takes; brain-modeled goal makes local-fast NOT a constraint.` Per docs-live-in-code, the rule must be visible at the point of use.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py (lines 650-720 — the local→cloud→local-retry chain has at least one 90s timeout that fired 2026-05-03 20:17:27), wild_igor/igor/cognition/reasoners/ollama_reasoner.py (internal timeouts if any), wild_igor/igor/cognition/preparse* (verify no short timeouts on local preparse calls).
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/local-inference-no-timeouts (the rule being implemented), theigors/rules/igor-constraints (Igor cognition path), theigors/rules/docs-live-in-code (inline rule comments at every touched site).
**Scope boundary:** IN: every local inference call site gets timeout audited and either removed or capped at 1-2hr; inline rule pointer comments added. OUT: cloud-side timeouts (those are fine — cloud rate-limits + network warrant short timeouts). OUT: routing changes (separate ticket T-user-turn-cloud-first-routing).
**Test plan:** integration test that simulates slow local inference (sleep 120s on Ollama call) and asserts it is NOT aborted and cloud is NOT auto-escalated. Manual: post a user turn after a known-slow local call mid-flight; verify inference completes rather than misreports as 'unavailable.'
**Validation:** log line `[inference_gateway] local call completed in Ns` at every successful local return — confirms the timeout removal is observable in production. **Cleanup:** none (no test artifacts beyond mocked timing). **Logging:** every removed timeout site adds `log.info` with elapsed time so we can see actual local latencies in prod.
